design_philosophy: High-end architecture studio approach. Emphasizes full-bleed photography, abundant negative space, refined typography, and a strict color palette. Must feel trustworthy, modern, minimal, and extremely premium. No generic yellow-black industrial themes.

headings.styling: tracking-tight, leading-tight. Never center-align universally; use purposeful alignment.

body.styling: leading-relaxed, text-[#94A3B8] for secondary, text-[#0F172A] for primary.

layout_and_spacing.grid_strategy: Use 'Bento' grid or asymmetric layouts for Services and Portfolio. generous spacing (gap-8 to gap-16) to allow content to breathe.
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Optical alignment over geometrical. Left-align dense content for readability.

components.navbar: Sticky, fixed top-0 w-full z-50. Initial state: transparent text-white. Scrolled state: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/90 text-[#0F172A] border-b border-[#E2E8F0].
components.hero: min-h-screen relative overflow-hidden. Ken Burns effect on background images (slow scale and pan). Overlay: bg-[#001F3F]/60 for text legibility. Large heading + Gold accent button.
components.stats_strip: bg-[#001F3F] text-white py-16. Use Framer Motion for animated counters. Gold accent for numbers.

buttons.primary: bg-[#C8A96B] text-white hover:bg-[#b3955a] transition-all duration-300 px-8 py-4 rounded-none text-sm uppercase tracking-wider font-semibold
buttons.secondary: border border-[#C8A96B] text-[#C8A96B] hover:bg-[#C8A96B] hover:text-white transition-all duration-300 px-8 py-4 rounded-none text-sm uppercase tracking-wider font-semibold
buttons.dark: bg-[#001F3F] text-white hover:bg-[#001429] transition-all duration-300 px-8 py-4 rounded-none text-sm uppercase tracking-wider font-semibold

cards.service: bg-white border border-[#E2E8F0] p-8 hover:-translate-y-2 transition-transform duration-300 group hover:shadow-xl
cards.testimonial: bg-white p-8 border border-[#E2E8F0] rounded-lg relative

components.portfolio: Filter tabs (All, Residential, Commercial). CSS Grid or Masonry for images. Lightbox effect on click.
components.process_timeline: Vertical line with numbered nodes in Gold. Alternating left/right content blocks on desktop.
components.contact: Form integrated with Formspree. Google Map embed adjacent to form. bg-[#F8FAFC].
components.footer: bg-[#001F3F] text-white py-20. Clean typography, WhatsApp floating button fixed to bottom right.

motion.reveal: Fade up with y: 30, opacity: 0 to 1, duration 0.6s, ease out.
motion.stagger: Stagger children in grids (delay: 0.1s per item).
motion.ken_burns: Animate scale from 1 to 1.1 and subtle pan over 5-8 seconds.

hero_slider.description: Premium luxury residential architecture villa at golden hour
Modern high-end commercial building facade at sunset

about_us.description: Close-up architectural detail of premium construction

portfolio_and_services.description: Modern building with glass facade against sky
Aerial view of active construction site

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure global CSS imports Google Fonts: Sora (400,600,700) and Inter (300,400,500).
Tailwind Config MUST be extended to map 'sora' and 'inter' fonts, and the specific color palette (primary, dark, gold, etc.).
Build a smooth scroll experience for the single-page layout (using react-scroll or native smooth scroll behavior).
Hero Section MUST include an auto-changing background image slider using the provided hero_slider media, with Framer Motion for the slow Ken Burns scaling effect.
Navbar must switch styles dynamically based on window.scrollY (from transparent/white text to white backdrop-blur/dark text).
Use lucide-react for all icons, setting strokeWidth={1.5} for a thin, elegant, premium look.
Testimonial section must be an auto-rotating carousel (use Swiper or Embla Carousel).
Add floating WhatsApp and back-to-top buttons in the bottom right, with high z-index.
Formspree action URL can be a placeholder or environment variable, but form must be fully styled.
Every interactive or informational element MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.
